Wooden Bench – Game Ready 3D Model

Thank you for purchasing this asset.
This package contains a wooden park bench model optimized for Unity.

Included Files

FBX Model
　WoodenBench.fbx

Textures (PNG)
　1024 x 768
　812 x 542
　Albedo

Materials
　Unity material files (Built-in and URP compatible)

Prefab
　WoodenBench.prefab

Features

Game-ready model
Clean UV layout
PBR workflow
Optimized for Unity 6 and URP
Real-world scale
Ready to use by placing the prefab in your scene

Technical Details

Format: FBX
Polygon count: 4,008 triangles
Texture resolution: 1024 x 768 and 812 x 542 (PNG)
Supported pipelines: Built-in, URP, HDRP
Units: meters

How to Use

Import the package into your Unity project.
Open your scene.
Drag WoodenBench.prefab into the scene.
Materials will be assigned automatically.
When using URP, upgrade materials with the URP Material Upgrader if necessary.
Adjust lighting to achieve your preferred look.

Support

For any issues or feature requests, contact me through the Unity Asset Store Publisher page.
